meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup Guide
content.seo_description: Learn to master Claude Code skills to eliminate slow development speed. A professional guide for freelancers using Antigravity to ship SaaS products faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and architectural scaffolding. By defining modular skill sets within your CLI environment, you reduce context switching, allowing you to ship high-quality features in hours rather than days, drastically increasing your project velocity and client satisfaction.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, your client is asking for updates, and you are stuck in the mud of boilerplate setup. Every minute spent manually scaffolding files or debugging syntax errors is a minute of profit leaking out of your business. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earning consultant isn't just coding skill—it's the velocity of your build system.

Claude Code is the force multiplier you've been waiting for. By pairing it with Antigravity, you transform your terminal into an autonomous engine that writes, tests, and deploys code while you focus on high-level architecture. It is time to stop typing every line and start orchestrating your software development lifecycle.

steps.title: Initialize the Workspace Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean, AI-ready directory structure that allows Claude Code to map your project architecture immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory structure and suggest a modular architecture for a SaaS application that minimizes coupling between the API layer and the frontend.

steps.title: Define Project Skills
steps.description: Create 'skills' or context files that tell Claude exactly how you prefer your code formatted, ensuring consistency across client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a style guide and architectural constraint document for this project, focusing on clean code principles and TypeScript best practices.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use your defined skills to generate complex features without manually writing repetitive boilerplate code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD module for a User profile including Zod validation and Prisma schema integration based on our project skills.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt="Generate user profile module based on current skills"

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Testing
steps.description: Shift testing left by having Claude Code write unit tests for every new feature before you even commit the code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Vitest suites for the newly generated user module, ensuring edge cases are covered.

steps.title: Refactor for Production Velocity
steps.description: Execute a final architectural review using Claude to identify bottlenecks and optimize performance before client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the current codebase, suggesting refactors to improve latency and reduce technical debt.

pro_tips: Always store your 'skills' files in a private GitHub repository to clone into new projects instantly.
Use Claude Code's --diff mode to review every AI-generated change; never blindly accept code without a quick visual scan.
Tag your prompts with specific architectural patterns (e.g., 'Clean Architecture', 'Hexagonal') to force the AI to follow your preferred design paradigm.
Run Claude Code inside a dedicated tmux session to keep your terminal environment persistent across machine reboots or network drops.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation alongside your code; keeping technical specs in sync with implementation saves hours of client explanation time.
content.next_steps: Once you have your workflow stabilized, focus on building a library of reusable 'Skill Templates' for specific client verticals like E-commerce or SaaS dashboards.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on repetitive tasks and start billing for your expertise. By mastering this setup, you reclaim your schedule and double your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
